name: Symptoms delayed after lifting at work in Saint George, still covered?
description: Yes if doctor links; report when symptoms hit.

mainEntity.name: Symptoms delayed after lifting at work in Saint George, still covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if doctor links; report when symptoms hit.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if linked to incident; Utah allows late discovery.**

Courts accept if no prejudice, symptoms manifest later.[4]

- Doctor ties to date of accident.
- Report when known.
- Within statute.

Attorney preserves via timely filing.[4]
